body:0001.source: This article is machine translated from english
body:0001.target: This article is machine translated from english

body:0003.source: The AI Analysis feature helps admins quickly understand, categorize, and analyze large volumes of resident input. It works for both ideation and surveys, offering:
body:0003.target: The AI Analysis feature helps admins quickly understand, categorize, and analyze large volumes of resident input. It works for both ideation and surveys, offering:

body:0004.source: Qualitative analysis: Summarizing textual input from ideas, comments, or survey responses
body:0004.target: Qualitative analysis: Summarizing textual input from ideas, comments, or survey responses

body:0005.source: Quantitative analysis : Exploring correlations between demographics, tags, and survey responses
body:0005.target: Quantitative analysis : Exploring correlations between demographics, tags, and survey responses

body:0006.source: ℹ️ Access to this feature depends on your plan.
body:0006.target: ℹ️ Access to this feature depends on your plan.

body:0008.source: The interface has four main columns:
body:0008.target: The interface has four main columns:

body:0009.source: Tag Management: Create and manage tags to group inputs
body:0009.target: Tag Management: Create and manage tags to group inputs

body:0010.source: Input List: Shows all contributions to analyze
body:0010.target: Input List: Shows all contributions to analyze

body:0011.source: User & Filter View: View anonymized user responses, apply filters, or drill into comments
body:0011.target: User & Filter View: View anonymized user responses, apply filters, or drill into comments

body:0012.source: Summaries & Questions: Summarize filtered inputs or ask AI for insights
body:0012.target: Summaries & Questions: Summarize filtered inputs or ask AI for insights

body:0013.source: How to use AI analysis for ideation/proposals?
body:0013.target: How to use AI analysis for ideation/proposals?

body:0015.source: Click the blue Open AI Analysis widget
body:0015.target: Click the blue Open AI Analysis widget

body:0016.source: Summarize inputs and comments (scroll to the comment section in column 3)
body:0016.target: Summarize inputs and comments (scroll to the comment section in column 3)

body:0017.source: Use filters (e.g., by demographics) to narrow focus before summarizing
body:0017.target: Use filters (e.g., by demographics) to narrow focus before summarizing

body:0018.source: How to use AI analysis for surveys?
body:0018.target: How to use AI analysis for surveys?

body:0020.source: Scroll down to the question you want to analyze
body:0020.target: Scroll down to the question you want to analyze

body:0021.source: Click Explore to add the questions to the analysis
body:0021.target: Click Explore to add the questions to the analysis

body:0022.source: Optionally, add follow-up questions for deeper analysis
body:0022.target: Optionally, add follow-up questions for deeper analysis

body:0023.source: How to filter and preview inputs?
body:0023.target: How to filter and preview inputs?

body:0024.source: Filter by timeframe, engagement level, or demographics
body:0024.target: Filter by timeframe, engagement level, or demographics

body:0025.source: Preview how answers distribute across demographics (only for users who completed their profile)
body:0025.target: Preview how answers distribute across demographics (only for users who completed their profile)

body:0026.source: ℹ️ Engagement level filter is only available for ideation/proposals projects
body:0026.target: ℹ️ Engagement level filter is only available for ideation/proposals projects

body:0027.source: How to use summarize and ask a question?
body:0027.target: How to use summarize and ask a question?

body:0028.source: Use Summarize to create a digest of selected inputs
body:0028.target: Use Summarize to create a digest of selected inputs

body:0029.source: Use Ask a Question to probe further
body:0029.target: Use Ask a Question to probe further

body:0030.source: Check in-line references and validate with original inputs
body:0030.target: Check in-line references and validate with original inputs

body:0031.source: Drag summaries into platform or project reports (summaries appear in the “AI” tab)
body:0031.target: Drag summaries into platform or project reports (summaries appear in the “AI” tab)

body:0033.source: Tagging helps cluster and interpret user input. The tool supports:
body:0033.target: Tagging helps cluster and interpret user input. The tool supports:

body:0034.source: Fully automated tagging: AI assigns common tags.
body:0034.target: Fully automated tagging: AI assigns common tags.

body:0036.source: By example: Provide manual examples to teach AI tagging.
body:0036.target: By example: Provide manual examples to teach AI tagging.

body:0037.source: Sentiment tagging: Mark input as positive or negative.
body:0037.target: Sentiment tagging: Mark input as positive or negative.

body:0039.source: Manual tagging: For full control, you can tag every input manually.
body:0039.target: Manual tagging: For full control, you can tag every input manually.

body:0041.source: Auto‑Insights connects tags, demographics, and survey questions to uncover patterns.
body:0041.target: Auto‑Insights connects tags, demographics, and survey questions to uncover patterns.

body:0042.source: Displays key correlations (e.g., which age group engages with which tag)
body:0042.target: Displays key correlations (e.g., which age group engages with which tag)

body:0043.source: Includes a heatmap view, with boxes marked if a correlation is statistically significant
body:0043.target: Includes a heatmap view, with boxes marked if a correlation is statistically significant

body:0044.source: Unit of analysis can be switched between:
body:0044.target: Unit of analysis can be switched between:

body:0050.source: In ideation, Auto‑Insights connects demographics to tags
body:0050.target: In ideation, Auto‑Insights connects demographics to tags

body:0051.source: In surveys, Auto‑Insights links demographics, tags, and survey questions
body:0051.target: In surveys, Auto‑Insights links demographics, tags, and survey questions

body:0052.source: You can get into the auto-insights by pressing explore below the demographic information of the AI tool interface.
body:0052.target: You can get into the auto-insights by pressing explore below the demographic information of the AI tool interface.

body:0054.source: The Summarize and Ask a Question tools generate quick insights but require human oversight.
body:0054.target: The Summarize and Ask a Question tools generate quick insights but require human oversight.

body:0055.source: Summaries include clickable references to original inputs for transparency
body:0055.target: Summaries include clickable references to original inputs for transparency

body:0056.source: Overloading the AI with too many inputs can reduce accuracy—filters & tags help
body:0056.target: Overloading the AI with too many inputs can reduce accuracy—filters & tags help

body:0057.source: Missing in-line references may happen for reasons like:
body:0057.target: Missing in-line references may happen for reasons like:

body:0061.source: ⚠️ Summaries are not 100% accurate. Always cross-check key findings with the original data.
body:0061.target: ⚠️ Summaries are not 100% accurate. Always cross-check key findings with the original data.

body:0063.source: For a complete demonstration of our AI Analysis tool, check out the recording of our AI Masterclass. Select your language for the appropriate recording.
body:0063.target: For a complete demonstration of our AI Analysis tool, check out the recording of our AI Masterclass. Select your language for the appropriate recording.
